<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Uid; /** * Interface to describe UIDs that contain a DateTimeImmutable as part of their behaviour. * * @author Barney Hanlon <barney.hanlon@cushon.co.uk> */ interface TimeBasedUidInterface { public function getDateTime(): \DateTimeImmutable; }
